blockers.description: The live `npm run dev` server only has code from when it started â€” many features were added since the user last restarted, so endpoints (e.g. /legitimate, /scope, /ai-control) 404 until restart.
blockers.workaround: Restart: stop process on 127.0.0.1:4773, then `cd companion && npm run dev`. Dashboard now shows 'restart the companion server' on 404.

human_actions_pending.action: Restart the companion server to load all features added this session
human_actions_pending.context: User was live-testing on cases test1â€“test4; their running server is several commits stale.

human_actions_pending.action: Optionally set DFIR_AI_SYNTH_MODEL to a strong model (gemini-2.5-pro / gpt-4o) and DFIR_AI_MODEL to a cheap one (gpt-4o-mini) for best granular results
human_actions_pending.context: Two-tier model strategy; synthesis is one text-only call so a strong model there is cheap.

decisions.decision: Two-phase analysis: cheap model extracts forensic events per-window; strong model synthesizes holistically
decisions.rationale: Findings/attacker-path need the whole timeline; extraction is high-volume so keep it cheap.

decisions.decision: Synthesis REPLACES the analytic layer (findings/IOCs/MITRE) instead of merging
decisions.rationale: Required so out-of-scope or stale conclusions drop cleanly; also avoids accumulation drift.

decisions.decision: Schema enums use .catch(fallback) and JSON is extracted via extractJsonText
decisions.rationale: One unexpected model value (e.g. IOC type 'malware') or a markdown fence must not reject the whole synthesis.

decisions.decision: Extraction must not guess finding ids or use capture time; synthesis back-links eventsâ†’findings via relatedEventIds and reads each event's own timestamp column
decisions.rationale: Findings don't exist at extraction; capture time != event time.

decisions.decision: Per-case side-stores (ai-control, legitimate, scope) as atomic JSON files; pure filters unit-tested separately
decisions.rationale: Keeps state user-curatable and non-destructive (raw events preserved).

next_action: No work is mid-flight. If resuming feature work, read CLAUDE.md first (esp. 'restart the dev server' gotcha), then run `cd companion && npm test` and `cd extension && npm test` to confirm green. User-facing next step: restart the companion server and reload the dashboard.
context_notes: Long iterative session: implemented the 4 plans then repeatedly extended/repaired based on the user's live testing on Velociraptor screenshots. Most issues traced to (a) a stale running server, (b) weak/slow AI models, (c) over-strict parsing. All fixed and documented in CLAUDE.md. Tree is clean on master; 89 companion + 10 extension tests green.
